name: RoyalSlotsToken
description: ERC-1155 multi-token contract for Matrix Spins Casino. Token ID 0 = fungible balance (1 token = $0.01 USD). Token ID N>0 = deposit receipt (non-fungible, one per deposit).

0.name: BALANCE
0.description: Player balance token. 1 token = $0.01 AUD. 100 tokens = $1.00 AUD.

N>0.name: DEPOSIT_RECEIPT
N>0.description: Unique deposit receipt. One minted per deposit transaction.

mint.signature: mint(address to, uint256 id, uint256 amount, bytes data)

burn.signature: burn(address from, uint256 id, uint256 amount)

balanceOf.usage: Query player balance: balanceOf(serverWallet, 0) / 100 = AUD balance
